creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text: That poudriere issue is not relevant here, not in the slightest, because it does not address how to avoid building or executing rustc in QEMU_EMULATING, which alone prevents building any port with a Rust component in that environment. You would need something akin to the static ccache option *inserted* into a builder jail on creation to avoid QEMU_EMULATING since packages are built for specific architectures.
